classifications.phrase: lower the cash rate target by 25 basis points
Inflation has fallen substantially since the peak in 2022
underlying inflation will continue to moderate to around the midpoint
private demand appears to have been recovering gradually
labour market conditions remain a little tight
labour market conditions have eased further in recent months
growth in unit labour costs remains high
underlying inflation continuing to decline back towards the midpoint
labour market conditions easing slightly, as expected
a further easing of monetary policy was appropriate
Board nevertheless remains cautious about the outlook

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a dovish stance through rate cuts and declining inflation expectations, but tempers this with caution about uncertainties and tight labour market conditions.
